name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: At 1021 Broad St Suite B, Sumter, SC 29150, you'll find TitleMax Title Loans. Call +1 803-774-6000 for more details.
description_long:
TitleMax is a national title loan lender with a Memphis, Tennessee location on Summer Avenue that has been serving the local community since February 2007. The store is situated one mile west of Highland Street and offers bilingual service, making it accessible to a broad range of local residents. With over 481 Google reviews averaging a perfect 5.00 out of 5 stars, this particular branch has built a strong local reputation.

The Summer Avenue location offers two primary product lines. The first is a Title Pledge and Flex Line of Credit, a secured loan product that uses your vehicle's title as collateral. Applicants need a clear vehicle title and a valid government-issued ID. TitleMax evaluates the vehicle's value, the requested amount, and the applicant's ability to repay. The second product is an Unsecured Flexible Line of Credit, available both in-store and online, which requires a valid ID, a recent bank account statement, and proof of income if recurring deposits are not visible on the statement. Online applications are restricted to residents of AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, or WI.

What sets this location apart is the combination of same-day cash funding, bilingual staff, and a flexible credit line model that allows borrowers to withdraw funds as needed up to their credit limit rather than receiving a single lump sum. Customers keep their vehicle while the loan is active, and the store performs credit checks but accepts most credit types, including poor credit. The location's consistently high customer reviews highlight staff members by name for professionalism and helpfulness.

Honestly, title loans and high-cost lines of credit are expensive emergency financial products and carry significant risk. Borrowers who cannot repay risk losing their vehicle, which can create deeper financial hardship. While TitleMax fills a gap for people who cannot access traditional bank loans, consumers should exhaust lower-cost options—such as credit union payday alternative loans or nonprofit credit counseling—before using a title loan. This product is best suited as a true last resort for urgent, short-term cash needs.
address: 1021 Broad St Suite B, Sumter, SC 29150

company_info.headquarters: 1021 Broad St Suite B, Sumter, SC 29150

pros: Same-day cash funding available on approved title loans
Accepts most credit types — credit score is not the sole qualifier
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle while the loan is active
Bilingual staff available at the Summer Avenue location
Offers both secured (title pledge) and unsecured line of credit options
Flex line of credit allows withdrawals over time rather than a single lump sum
481+ Google reviews with a 5.00/5 average rating at this branch
cons: Title loans carry risk of vehicle repossession if the borrower cannot repay
No APR or rate information disclosed on the store page — 'competitive rates' is unverified
Online unsecured credit line is restricted to only 11 states
Sunday hours are unavailable — store is closed on Sundays
Requires a clear vehicle title, excluding borrowers with liens or financing on their car
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or thin credit who need cash the same day
Borrowers who have been denied traditional personal loans or bank financing
Memphis-area residents needing a bilingual lending experience
Consumers who need revolving access to funds rather than a one-time lump sum
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners with poor credit who face an urgent, short-term cash need and have no access to lower-cost alternatives. The main caveat is that title loans are high-cost products with vehicle repossession risk, and no interest rate information is published, making true cost comparison impossible before applying.
services: Title pledge loans secured by vehicle title
Unsecured flexible line of credit (in-store and online)
Credit check with most credit types accepted
Vehicle value assessment for loan qualification
Customer account management portal for existing loans
Flexible withdrawal from credit line up to credit limit
